response:
Sec. 1  
govt of andhra pradesh was led by venkaiah naidu in 2019  
***  
the prime minister of andhra pradesh in 2019 was venkaiah naidu  
***  
venkaiah naidu served as the chief minister of andhra pradesh from 2014 to 2019  
***  
venkaiah naidu was the leader of the telugu desam party in 2019  
***  
the andhra pradesh government in 2019 focused on economic development and infrastructure projects  
***  
the chief minister of andhra pradesh in 2019 was appointed by the central government  
***  
the andhra pradesh chief minister in 2019 was a member of the lok sabha  
***  
the andhra pradesh chief minister in 2019 was known for his initiatives in education and healthcare
